alerts.header: Stop 60386 Eastbound W 41 Ave @ East Blvd is temporarily closed beginning Monday May 4. Please use new stop 60548 near Maple St.

UPDATE: Stop 51987 Eastbound E 49 Ave @ Elliott St is temporarily closed from Tue May 12 through Tue May 26 due to construction. 430 bus will be picking up passengers at the next stop #51988 EB 49 Ave and Vivian St.

Stop 60732 Westbound 49 Ave @ Main St is closed beginning Monday May 18. Please use original stop 52030 on other side of Main St.
